title: Do Nuclear Blasts Interfere with UFOs?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses theories about how nuclear blasts may interfere with UFOs, suggesting that EMP waves and gamma radiation from nuclear detonations could travel through multiple dimensions and disrupt extraterrestrial vehicles' systems.

acronyms.definition: An electromagnetic wave effect from nuclear blasts that may travel through multiple dimensions and potentially disrupt extraterrestrial vehicles

key_claims.claim: EMP waves from nuclear blasts travel through multiple dimensions
Nuclear detonations produce a scalar or longitudinal wave that is faster than the speed of light
This scalar wave disrupts the fabric, communication, and propulsion guidance systems of extraterrestrial vehicles
The first atomic bomb detonation and subsequent nuclear blasts may have sent signals to or affected beings in other dimensions
